Background
[
]

Xu Liguo initially had a close relationship with the 
Corpse Sect
, as it suffered a lethal wound and required the services of this sect, which was precisely to offer the corpses of other cultivators to extend life. When Wang Lin found him, he was using the body of an 
Foundation Establishment
 as storage for his nascent soul, so he was very weak and easily trapped.

Etymology
[
]

Etymology and meaning
 of the Chinese name 
Xu Liguo (徐立国)
 in detail: 

1. 徐 (Xú)
[
]

Pinyin:
 Xú

Meaning:

Commonly means 
slow, gentle, calm, serene.

Also a very old and prestigious Chinese surname, historically linked to the 
State of Xu (徐国)
 during the Zhou dynasty, which was located in present-day Jiangsu and Anhui provinces.

Symbolically, “徐” conveys a sense of grace, composure, and steadiness.

Cultural connotation:

People with the surname Xu are often thought of as gentle and steady, embodying a patient and cultivated temperament.

2. 立 (Lì)
[
]

Meaning:

To stand, to establish, to set up, to found, to rise.

In names, it symbolizes 
independence
, 
ambition
, 
uprightness
, and 
strength of will
.

Common in compound names implying “to establish something important” — like virtue, family, or nation.

Symbolism:

“立” in names reflects someone who is upright and determined, one who stands firm in principles or goals.

3. 国 (Guó)
[
]

Meaning:

Country, nation, state, realm.

Often represents patriotism, unity, or greatness.

In personal names, it conveys a wish for loyalty to one’s nation, or metaphorically, the ideal of building or protecting a great domain.

Symbolism:

“国” gives a grand, noble air — a person destined to contribute to society or uphold national ideals.

History
[
]

Xu Liguo
 is a 
Nascent Soul
 cultivator from the Tian Gang Sect who was refined into a devil by 
Wang Lin
 and becomes his servant. Later, he becomes the Sword Spirit of the Rain Celestial Sword when 
Wang Lin
 receives its inheritance from 
Zhou Yi
.

When 
Wang Lin
 sends the souls of those in the cave world to be reincarnated in the 
Immortal Astral Continent
, Xu Liguo is one of them. Becoming human again, he reincarnates in the 
Celestial Clan
 and is seen in the 
Central Continent
, serving 
Lian Daofei
. After meeting with 
Wang Lin
 again he serves him once more, but is released by him at the end of the novel. 

Personality
[
]

Shameless and silver-tongued, he is always ready to flatter 
Wang Lin
 with the hope of reaping good rewards. He is also very treacherous and vengeful, always seeking and debating an opportunity to betray and kill 
Wang Lin
. However, these plans usually fail miserably and has him begging for his life on a constant basis.

He also believes that enjoying life is essential. Women or Men, he wants them all to serve him (well, only the prettiest ones). Being acclaimed and praised is, for Xu Liguo, as important as showing off his status of a devil under a devilishly powerful 
fiend
.
